:00-5:00 pm The BEARS Center for Hybrid and Embedded Software Systems (CHESS) Open House will be held on Thursday, February 12, 2009, from 2:00-5:00 pm. in the Donald O. Pederson Center on the fifth floor of Cory Hall at the UC Berkeley Cam

ifth floor of Cory Hall at the UC Berkeley Campus. At the open house we will feature demonstrations and posters by CHESS students, postdoctoral scholars and faculty. During the morning, there will be talks by faculty members including Dean

will be talks by faculty members including Dean Shankar Sastry. BEARS gives industrial partners of the university the opportunity to have firsthand interaction with students and faculty in a research context. This is beneficial to industrial partic

h context. This is beneficial to industrial participants, to make connections between ongoing work in academia and emerging problems in industry, as well as to student participants, to seek out relevant "real-world" applications for their work, and t
